doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated March 2026 (future), uses non-standard EDPB formatting and numbering, and contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not issue documents dated in the future (2026), the reference format is inconsistent with actual EDPB naming conventions, and the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data regardless of who holds the key.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (future), uses non-standard EDPB formatting and numbering, and contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data.
